---
title: Setup
---

## Overview

This course is designed for researchers and professional services staff working in digital research environments. You can complete the activities with a web browser and access to standard university systems.

## Recommended Preparation

1. Ensure you can access your university account and Microsoft 365.
2. Confirm access to Teams, OneDrive, and SharePoint.
3. Bring a device that can open spreadsheets (Excel preferred).
4. Download any activity datasets linked from session pages.

## Optional Preparation

- Install a QR code reader app on your phone for in-class polls.
- Bring a recent project example so you can apply governance and data management tasks directly.

## During the Course

- Keep all working files in one dedicated folder for the course.
- Save outputs from practical tasks (templates, notes, summaries) to reuse in your own research projects.
